name: Higgsfield + Seedance Video Suite
description: Modular AI image + video workflow: brief, image/character/character-sheet/prop-sheet/environment/style/storyboard generation, Seedance 2 / Higgsfield video prompts, audio, passthrough validation, and handoff. Every skill is dual-mode (drives the Higgsfield MCP or emits paste-ready prompts), clarifies missing parameters first, and supports multiple characters, props, and environments. Two orchestrators: image and video.
author: Alessandro Cauduro

skills.name: video-workflow-orchestrator
skills.responsibility: Guided scratch-to-finished-video driver; routes specialists, manages gates, selects MCP vs prompt mode; supports multiple characters and environments.

skills.name: image-workflow-orchestrator
skills.responsibility: Guided idea-to-image-set driver; style board, characters, sheets, environments, hero images; MCP vs prompt mode.

skills.name: creative-brief-grill
skills.responsibility: One-question-at-a-time interview producing an approved image or video brief (cast, environments, format, execution mode).

skills.name: image-generator
skills.responsibility: Generic single/freeform image: emit a prompt and/or call generate_image. Clarifies format and style first.

skills.name: character-designer
skills.responsibility: Define one character's canonical look + identity block + reuse strategy (Soul vs Element); dual-mode.

skills.name: character-sheet-builder
skills.responsibility: Multi-view/expression/pose sheet locking identity via master-then-derive; dual-mode.

skills.name: environment-sheet-builder
skills.responsibility: Coherent location reference board (empty master + bible + angles + time-of-day); dual-mode.

skills.name: style-board-builder
skills.responsibility: Style/mood/palette board defining the look as continuity constraints; dual-mode.

skills.name: prop-sheet-builder
skills.responsibility: Prop/object design sheet (multi-angle views, callouts, scale, variants, palette); reusable as an Element; dual-mode.

skills.name: storyboard-builder
skills.responsibility: Shot list + storyboard frames binding cast/locations per shot; dual-mode.

skills.name: asset-approval-gate
skills.responsibility: Approve/revise/reject for prompts AND generated media; owns the named multi-asset map.

skills.name: video-prompt-architect
skills.responsibility: Final structured video prompt (Seedance/Kling/Veo/Cinema via Higgsfield); t2v/i2v/multi-shot; emit and/or call generate_video.

skills.name: audio-generator
skills.responsibility: Speech/voiceover: emit a script/voice spec and/or call generate_audio (TTS only).

skills.name: passthrough-guardian
skills.responsibility: Validate SEND VERBATIM cleanliness and asset-map consistency (and the prompt string before an MCP call).

skills.name: higgsfield-package-adapter
skills.responsibility: Final handoff package; in MCP mode drives upload + generation + polling.
